series_metadata.series_title: Unstamped Cigarettes Received in Ohio Form
series_metadata.series_description: This form is used by wholesale cigarette dealters to report unstamped cigarettes received monthly at their premises.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: 3 years after the end of the calendar year for forms received during the calendar year. If scanned, retain for 6 months. ; Electronic: Retain for 3 years after the end of the calendar year for forms received during the calendar year., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
